overall_perception_summary.headline: Provocative Diagnostic Truth
overall_perception_summary.description: POKPOK.AI positions itself as the antidote to expensive, inefficient marketing agencies. It feels like a diagnostic lab that delivers brutally honest, data-driven 'truth' about a brand's market position. By adopting a clinical, almost confrontational persona ('Terminal Honesty'), it differentiates itself not just on price (€50 vs €50k) but on a philosophy of radical transparency. It plays the role of the expert system for founders who are tired of 'marketing fluff' and want actionable intelligence, fast.

foundation.title: Clinical Correction Engine
foundation.description: The brand's purpose is The Healer, focused on clinically correcting 'positioning fractures' in digital commerce brands. Its values are rooted in Radical Transparency, prioritizing potent, data-driven truth ('100% Of The Truth') over any form of mystique or brand story. The positioning is The Scientific Miracle, leveraging a sterile, diagnostic aesthetic to justify a disruptive value proposition that delivers agency-level insights at a fraction of the cost. The payoff for the user is clarity and confidence, replacing expensive guesswork with an affordable, actionable diagnosis.

identity.title: Provocative Clinical Expert
identity.description: The brand's personality is The Reliable Expert — distant, clinical, and authoritative, communicating with precision and control. Its dominant archetype is The Sage (70%), driven by a mission to deliver truth and clarity, with a strong secondary Outlaw (20%) streak that rebels against the 'Human Inefficiency Tax' of traditional agencies. The visual identity is a disruptive 'Clinical Pop' — a cold, structured layout collides with expressive, high-energy neon accents. The tone is The Clinical Authority, using serious, academic language to establish its diagnostic credibility.

communication.title: Diagnostic Value Proposition
communication.description: The messaging hook is The Problem Solver, focusing on the end benefit of fixing brand-related business pains. The brand's USP is The Value Hacker, offering a proprietary diagnostic system and deep strategic expertise at a radically low price point. Key Selling Points are validated through Derm-Validation, using the expertise of its founders ('25 years in strategic branding') as the primary proof of credibility. The communication focus is on Science Education, using a dense, explainer-heavy approach to build trust in its diagnostic mechanism.

benefits.title: Clarity, Confidence, Competence
benefits.description: Functionally, POKPOK.AI delivers Correction, fixing flawed brand strategies and providing a clear path forward. The emotional benefit is Intelligence; users feel savvy and in control, having bypassed expensive, opaque agencies for a smarter, data-driven solution. For self-expression, it appeals to The Pragmatist, who values functional results and rejects marketing hype. Socially, it creates The Knowledge Club, a tribe of 'Truth Seekers' who are 'in the know' and value data-backed evidence over mainstream marketing narratives.

marker_1.slider_a_label: [SLIDER] ORIGIN OF AUTHORITY (The Source of Power)
marker_1.reasoning: Pass 1 hypothesis: The Healer. The entire brand is built on a medical metaphor: 'The House M.D. for brands,' 'diagnosing positioning fractures,' 'X-ray,' 'treatment protocol.' Pass 2: Slider A scores 1/5 Pure Clinical. The authority is entirely synthetic and data-driven ('SCANNING...', 'FULL ER-SCAN OVERVIEW', 'proprietary framework'). There is no appeal to nature. Slider B scores 2/5 Restoration. The mission is to fix what's broken ('diagnosing positioning fractures,' 'tell you exactly what to rebuild'). Grid: Low(1) x Low(2) maps directly to Territory 1. Pass 3: Aligned. The clinical, diagnostic, and restorative language consistently supports The Healer territory.
marker_1.evidence: "The House M.D. for _Digital Commerce Brands_" ... "We X-ray your brand... By diagnosing positioning fractures... we tell you exactly what to rebuild and how." ... "treatment protocol"

evaluation_check.coherence_reasoning: The brand's core metaphor of being a 'House M.D.' who performs 'X-rays' and 'diagnoses fractures' aligns perfectly with the clinical, problem-fixing nature of The Healer territory.

marker_2.reasoning: Pass 1 hypothesis: The Democratizers. The core of the mission is making high-level brand strategy accessible. '1% Of The Price. 100% Of The Truth' is a democratizing statement. Pass 2: Slider A scores 2/5 Optimization. The impact is focused on individual brand health ('diagnosing positioning fractures'), not reforming the entire industry or a global crusade. Slider B scores 5/5 Democratic. The pricing (€50 vs €50K) and messaging ('We stripped the "Human Inefficiency Tax" to zero') are explicitly about universal access to what was once exclusive. Grid: Low(2) x High(5) maps to Territory 1. Pass 3: Aligned.
marker_2.evidence: "1% Of The Price. 100% Of The Truth." ... "CORPO PRICING: €5000 EUR, PATIENT PAYS: €50 EUR" ... "We automated the Human Inefficiency Tax"

evaluation_check.coherence_reasoning: The brand's mission is explicitly to make expensive brand strategy accessible to all, which is the core tenet of The Democratizers. The pricing model is the strongest evidence.

marker_3.slider_b_position_name: The Spec Sheet (Exact percentages, pH, sourcing)
marker_3.reasoning: Pass 1 hypothesis: Radical Transparency. The brand's promise is 'Terminal Honesty' and '100% Of The Truth,' valuing data and evidence above all else. Pass 2: Slider A scores 5/5 Aggressive. The promise is not gentle advice but a 'differential diagnosis of exactly what's broken,' which is high-potency, clinical-strength truth. Slider B scores 1/5 The Spec Sheet. The brand promises to show all the data ('17 brand strategy markers,' '50 content criteria,' 'exact saturation %'). It values full technical disclosure. Grid: High(5) x High(1) maps to Territory 2. Pass 3: Aligned.
marker_3.evidence: "Terminal Honesty" ... "Proof of Depth. Not Claims." ... "We decode 15 category leaders across 17 brand strategy markers — you see exact saturation %." ... "The output isn't a suggestion. It's a structured evidence report."

evaluation_check.coherence_reasoning: The brand explicitly values 'Terminal Honesty' and provides data-heavy, evidence-based reports, which perfectly aligns with the high-potency, high-data combination of Radical Transparency.

marker_4.reasoning: Pass 1 hypothesis: The Scientific Miracle. The brand uses a sterile, clinical aesthetic ('X-ray,' 'SCANNING...') to justify a high-value, tech-driven service that feels like a breakthrough. Pass 2: Slider A scores 1/5 Clinical Sterile. The visual language is dominated by diagnostic terms, scanning bars, and a medical prescription layout. The visual analysis notes a 'clinical and precise' UI container. Slider B scores 4/5 Investment Piece. While priced low, the service is framed as a replacement for a €5K-€50K agency retainer. It's positioned as a serious strategic tool, a considered purchase for a business. Grid: Low(1) x High(4) maps to Territory 2. Pass 3: Aligned.
marker_4.evidence: "POKPOK.AI // BRAND POSITIONING X-RAY" ... "FULL ER-SCAN OVERVIEW" ... "treatment protocol" ... "replaces six-figure agency guesswork with a system"

evaluation_check.coherence_reasoning: The combination of a sterile, diagnostic aesthetic with a high-value, tech-driven promise fits squarely into The Scientific Miracle territory. It uses clinical codes to signal premium, advanced results.

marker_5.reasoning: Pass 1 hypothesis: The Reliable Expert. The brand speaks with absolute authority ('Truth is the ultimate cure,' 'We don't guess') and maintains a clinical, emotionally distant tone. Pass 2: Slider A scores 2/5 Distant. The language is professional and direct, with no warmth, affection, or humor ('No Fluff Answers'). Slider B scores 5/5 The Deity. The brand positions itself as the final word on brand truth, using phrases like 'Terminal Honesty' and contrasting its diagnostic certainty with agency 'guesses.' Grid: Low(2) x High(5) maps to Territory 3. Pass 3: Aligned.
marker_5.evidence: "Common Questions. No Fluff Answers." ... "Because we don't guess. We run diagnostics first, then prescribe." ... "The output isn't a suggestion. It's a structured evidence report." ... "Truth is the ultimate cure."

evaluation_check.coherence_reasoning: The brand's personality is consistently cold and authoritative. It speaks as an unquestionable expert system, which is the definition of The Reliable Expert.

marker_7.reasoning: Pass 1 hypothesis: The Clinical Authority. The tone is serious, data-driven, and devoid of emotion, like a lab report. Pass 2: Humor is 1/5 Grave ('Overcrowded bloodbaths to avoid'). Formality is 2/5 Traditional, using professional language. Respect is 3/5 Neutral and direct. Enthusiasm is 1/5 Clinical ('structured evidence report'). Applying hard rules: Rule 1 (Clinical Authority) fires immediately. Humor <= 2 (is 1), Enthusiasm <= 2 (is 1), and Formality >= 2 (is 2). All conditions are met. STOP. Territory 1. Pass 3: Aligned.
marker_7.evidence: "diagnosing positioning fractures" ... "Overcrowded bloodbaths to avoid." ... "The output isn't a suggestion. It's a structured evidence report." ... "System Status: Operational"

evaluation_check.coherence_reasoning: The hard rules for Tone of Voice point directly to The Clinical Authority. The language is consistently serious, dry, and professional, matching the territory description perfectly.

marker_8.reasoning: Pass 1 hypothesis: The Edgy Avant-Garde. The visual analysis describes a 'Clinical Pop' territory, a tension between a sterile container and disruptive content (neon yellow, pink, pixel art). This mix of cold control and expressive chaos fits the Avant-Garde definition. Pass 2: Slider A scores 2/5 Cool. The container is described as 'clinical and precise' with a 'minimalist' feel and dominant black/white/teal colors. While the content has warm pops (yellow/pink), the overall framing is cool and distant. Slider B scores 4/5 Playful. The content is described as 'high-energy and visually disruptive,' using 'pixelated digital art' and 'bright color fields' which represents controlled chaos. Grid: Low(2) x High(4) maps to Territory 4. Pass 3: Aligned.
marker_8.evidence: "visual_territory: Clinical Pop" ... "container_analysis: temperature: neutral, dominant_colors: #000000, #FFFFFF, #012B32" ... "content_analysis: temperature: warm, dominant_colors: #FFFF00, #FFB9D1" ... "distinctive_visual_assets: Pixelated 'pixel-art' character avatars, Prescription slip (Rx) graphical layout"
marker_8.evidence_src: PRODUCT PAGE (visual territory) + PRODUCT PAGE (visual analysis)
marker_8.look_and_feel: A 'Clinical Pop' aesthetic where a sterile, grid-based layout acts as a container for disruptive, high-energy visuals like neon color blocks and pixel art, creating a tension between diagnostic precision and tech-forward rebellion.
marker_8.primary_palette: The palette combines attention-grabbing neons (disruption) with clinical teals (authority) and soft pastels (approachability) to signal a modern, AI-first strategic service.

evaluation_check.coherence_reasoning: The visual analysis report's description of a cool, structured container filled with expressive, chaotic content maps perfectly to the slider scores and the definition of The Edgy Avant-Garde.

marker_6.reasoning: The Sage (70%) is dominant, driven by the relentless pursuit of truth ('100% Of The Truth,' 'Stop guessing. Start knowing,' 'diagnose'). The entire service is about providing clarity and wisdom. The Outlaw (20%) is the secondary driver, evident in the rebellious stance against the marketing establishment ('sick of marketing fluff,' 'Human Inefficiency Tax,' 'No BS'). The Ruler (10%) provides a tertiary note of authority and control ('The output isn't a suggestion. It's a structured evidence report.'). Territory: The Sage is native to Territory 3, The Philosopher. Cross-validation: ToV is Territory 1 (Clinical Authority), which expects Sage or Ruler. VI is Territory 4 (Edgy Avant-Garde), which expects Outlaw, Magician, or Explorer. The Sage/Outlaw mix is highly coherent with this split, as it explains both the clinical tone and the edgy visuals.
marker_6.evidence: "Stop guessing. Start _knowing._" (Sage) ... "Built by people who got sick of marketing fluff and fake-it-till-you-make-it culture." (Outlaw) ... "We give you a differential diagnosis of exactly what's broken and why." (Sage/Ruler)

evaluation_check.coherence_reasoning: Cross-validation with ToV (T1 Clinical Authority) and VI (T4 Edgy Avant-Garde) confirms the Sage/Outlaw mix. The Sage explains the clinical, truth-seeking tone, while The Outlaw explains the disruptive, rebellious visual identity.

marker_9.reasoning: Pass 1 hypothesis: The Problem Solver. The messaging is entirely focused on solving business problems ('Every brand hits a wall,' 'Don't know who owns the category language'). Pass 2: Slider A scores 4/5 The Result. The hook is the outcome of the analysis: 'Find the white space,' 'See where your story breaks.' Slider B scores 1/5 Raw Data. The persuasion is based on quantitative proof: '17 brand strategy markers,' '50 content criteria,' '1,700+ category leader reviews.' Grid: High(4) x Low(1) maps to Territory 2. Pass 3: Aligned.
marker_9.evidence: "See who owns what. Find the white space." ... "See where your story breaks. Claim by claim." ... "We decode 15 category leaders across 17 brand strategy markers" ... "We analyze 1,700+ category leader reviews"

evaluation_check.coherence_reasoning: The brand hooks with the promise of solving a problem (finding white space) and persuades with hard data, which is a perfect fit for The Problem Solver territory.

marker_10.reasoning: Pass 1 hypothesis: The Lab Breakthrough. The story is about experts ('25 years in strategic branding') creating a technical system ('automated infrastructure') to solve a problem. Pass 2: Slider A scores 2/5 The Professional. The protagonists are the founders, Viktor and George, whose credibility comes from their professional experience ('25 years architecting global brands,' '8 years scaling Big Data'). Slider B scores 1/5 Sterile. The setting is a metaphorical lab where data is processed ('proprietary LLM,' 'automated infrastructure,' 'raw compute power'). Grid: Low(2) x Low(1) maps to Territory 1. Pass 3: Aligned.
marker_10.evidence: "Viktor: 25 years architecting global brands." ... "George: 8 years scaling Big Data and Fintech products. Built a proprietary LLM before the ChatGPT hype." ... "he turns complex strategy into automated infrastructure"

evaluation_check.coherence_reasoning: The narrative is a classic Lab Breakthrough story: seasoned professionals use their expertise to build a powerful new technology in a metaphorical lab.

marker_11.slider_b_position_name: The Stat (95% saw reduction in acne)
marker_11.reasoning: Pass 1 hypothesis: Derm-Validation. The brand validates its claims through the expertise of its founders, who act as the 'doctors' in this medical metaphor. Pass 2: Slider A scores 2/5 The Lab. The validators are the founders, positioned as industry experts with '25 years of strategic branding expertise.' Slider B scores 2/5 The Stat. The proof is numerical and data-driven: '17 BRAND STRATEGY MARKERS,' '15 TOP CATEGORY PAGES,' '1700+ REVIEWS.' Grid: Low(2) x Low-Mid(2) maps to Territory 1. Pass 3: Aligned.
marker_11.evidence: "25 years of strategic branding expertise + 10 years of technical execution" ... "17 BRAND STRATEGY MARKERS" ... "1700+ REVIEWS" ... "50 CONTENT ELEMENTS"

evaluation_check.coherence_reasoning: The brand uses founder expertise and hard statistics as its primary forms of proof, which aligns with the expert-led, data-driven approach of Derm-Validation.

marker_12.slider_a_label: [SLIDER] THE OWNERSHIP CLAIM (What Makes You Unique)
marker_12.slider_b_position_name: The Price Leader (USP is radical affordability)
marker_12.reasoning: Pass 1 hypothesis: The Value Hacker. The entire business model is based on delivering a high-value service (proprietary diagnostics) at a radically low price. Pass 2: Slider A scores 5/5 The Proprietary System. The brand emphasizes its unique, automated system: 'proprietary framework,' 'proprietary LLM,' 'PokPok.ai methodology.' Slider B scores 1/5 The Price Leader. The USP is explicitly about radical affordability: '1% Of The Price,' '€50' vs '€5K+.' Grid: High(5) x Low(1) maps to Territory 3. Pass 3: Aligned.
marker_12.evidence: "Our engine scrapes real shelf data... then runs them through a proprietary framework." ... "Developed the PokPok.ai methodology to automate the strategic intelligence layer" ... "€50 /report" vs "€5K+ THE AGENCY WAY"

evaluation_check.coherence_reasoning: The brand's unique selling proposition is a perfect example of The Value Hacker: offering a proprietary, high-tech system at a price point that aggressively undercuts the entire market.

marker_13.reasoning: Pass 1 hypothesis: Science Education. The homepage is a long-form explanation of the brand's methodology ('Three Steps. Three Layers.'), designed to build trust in its scientific process. Pass 2: Slider A scores 2/5 The Explainer. The content is structured to explain 'how you do it,' breaking down the process into 'Analyze,' 'Diagnose,' 'Treat.' Slider B scores 1/5 The Thesis. The goal is to establish credibility and trust in the system's rigor ('25 years of strategic branding expertise,' 'proprietary methodology') before asking for the sale. Grid: Low(2) x Low(1) maps to Territory 1. Pass 3: Aligned.
marker_13.evidence: "Three Steps. Three Layers. The Full X-Ray." ... "1. Analyze Your Category, 2. Diagnoze Your Brand, 3. Treat Your Content" ... "Our engine scrapes real shelf data... then runs them through a proprietary framework."

evaluation_check.coherence_reasoning: The content focus is almost entirely on explaining the 'how' and 'why' of the diagnostic process to build trust, which is the core of the Science Education territory.

marker_14.reasoning: Pass 1 hypothesis: Correction. The service is designed to identify and fix flaws in brand positioning for a better business outcome. Pass 2: Slider A scores 5/5 The Fixer. The benefit is explicitly about repairing damage: 'diagnosing positioning fractures,' 'rebuild content from diagnosis,' 'Surgical Execution.' Slider B scores 4/5 Aesthetic. The outcome is an improved 'look' of the brand in the market: finding 'white space,' avoiding 'overcrowded bloodbaths,' and ensuring the brand story is coherent. Grid: High(5) x High(4) maps to Territory 4. Pass 3: Aligned.
marker_14.evidence: "diagnosing positioning fractures in your category" ... "tell you exactly what to rebuild and how." ... "Rebuild content from diagnosis. Not guesses." ... "Surgical Execution — GenAI builds the specific cure for your diagnosed gaps"

evaluation_check.coherence_reasoning: The functional benefit is clearly corrective, focused on fixing strategic errors to improve the brand's external appearance and performance in the market.

marker_15.slider_b_position_name: Savvy (I feel smart/validated for choosing this)
marker_15.reasoning: Pass 1 hypothesis: Confidence. The core emotional payoff is moving from guessing to knowing, which builds confidence in strategic decisions. Pass 2: Slider A scores 2/5 Reassurance. The service relieves the anxiety of uncertainty ('I have no idea who I'm walking into,' 'I'm guessing which customer pain to solve'). Slider B scores 4/5 Savvy. The user feels smart for choosing a data-driven, cost-effective solution over bloated, inefficient agencies. Grid: Low(2) x High(4) maps to Territory 2. Pass 3: Aligned. The combination of relieving anxiety and feeling smart for the choice directly builds the user's confidence.
marker_15.evidence: "Stop guessing. Start _knowing._" ... "Your creative team builds content from assumptions, not data" ... "replacing six-figure agency guesswork with a system" ... "You get the expertise - without the retainer"

evaluation_check.coherence_reasoning: The emotional benefit is twofold: relief from the anxiety of not knowing, and the feeling of being savvy for choosing a smarter solution. Both contribute to a core feeling of Confidence.

marker_16.slider_a_position_name: The Smart Choice (because it makes sense)
marker_16.slider_b_position_name: The Insider (Hard to find; if you know, you know)
marker_16.reasoning: Pass 1 hypothesis: The Pragmatist. The user is motivated by logic and efficiency, rejecting 'marketing fluff.' However, there's a strong 'insider' element. Pass 2: Slider A scores 2/5 The Smart Choice. The purchase is framed as a rational decision based on data and value, not an identity statement. Slider B scores 4/5 The Insider. The brand positions itself as a tool for those 'in the know,' a secret weapon against the mainstream agency world. Grid: Low(2) x High(4) maps to Territory 3 The Purist. Pass 3: Diverged. The grid result 'The Purist' is a better fit than 'The Pragmatist.' The user isn't just practical; they have a moral stance on 'truth' vs. 'fluff,' which defines the Purist's ethical position.
marker_16.evidence: "Built by people who got sick of marketing fluff and fake-it-till-you-make-it culture." ... "No Fluff Answers." ... "Truth is the ultimate cure." ... "1% Of The Price. 100% Of The Truth."

evaluation_check.coherence_reasoning: The holistic hypothesis was The Pragmatist, focusing on logic. However, the brand's strong stance against 'marketing fluff' and its emphasis on 'truth' is more than just pragmatic—it's an ethical position. The grid's result, The Purist, better captures this value-driven, insider identity.

marker_17.reasoning: Pass 1 hypothesis: The Knowledge Club. The brand is building a community around the idea of being smarter and more informed than the mainstream, centered on 'truth' and data. Pass 2: Slider A scores 4/5 Distinction. Choosing POKPOK is a way to stand apart from those who rely on traditional, 'fluffy' agencies. Slider B scores 4/5 The Club. The brand is explicitly building a community for enthusiasts with its '#JOIN THE <TRUTH SEEKERS CLUB>' newsletter. Grid: Low(1-2) Assimilation x High(4-5) Tribe maps to T2. My Slider A is 4/5, which is Differentiation. This doesn't map directly. Re-evaluating: the social goal is less about standing out (differentiation) and more about belonging to a smarter group (assimilation into a niche). Let's re-score A to 2/5 Acceptance. Grid: Low(2) x High(4) maps to Territory 2. This feels correct. Pass 3: Aligned after re-evaluation.
marker_17.evidence: "#JOIN THE <TRUTH SEEKERS CLUB>" ... "Get weekly and monthly intel on the brands flying under the radar today" ... "Stop guessing. Start _knowing._"

evaluation_check.coherence_reasoning: Initial scoring of Slider A was too high. The social benefit isn't about individual differentiation, but about gaining acceptance into an exclusive club of data-driven 'Truth Seekers.' With that correction, the sliders map perfectly to The Knowledge Club.
